title: Create: Henry
description: A create add-on with Create: Dreams n Desires features and more.
body:
A create add-on with Create: Dreams n Desires features and more.

 

## Features

Most of [Create: Dreams & Desires](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-dreams-and-desires) features retextured and remodeled

![Screenshot of the features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c13d13f1bc8cd857d4e06cb53f91f0b890c71b0_0.webp)

## Supported Create Versions

Create 0.6.x

Create 0.5.1

## Support

If you would like to offer support, you can [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/chocoboyy)
